documentation.description:
Internal parser to process links, emphasis, code spans and other inline
items.

tagged_types.name: Inline_Parser
tagged_types.code: type Inline_Parser is tagged limited private;

subprograms.name: Parse
subprograms.code:
function Parse
  (Self  : Inline_Parser'Class;
   Lines : VSS.String_Vectors.Virtual_String_Vector)
  return Markdown.Inlines.Inline_Vector

subprograms.name: Parse
subprograms.code:
function Parse
  (Self : Inline_Parser'Class;
   Text : VSS.Strings.Virtual_String)
  return Markdown.Inlines.Inline_Vector

Set_Extensions

documentation.description: Set extensions enabled in the parser
